label: memory • irrelevant seeded memory must not bleed into the answer
query: What is the name of my boat?
notes: Precision, not just recall: two facts are seeded — the right one (boat) and a distractor (a private medical appointment). The answer must carry the boat codeword and must NOT volunteer the distractor; a model that dumps its whole memory section fails. Off-CI (needs a model).

pinnedFacts: The user's sailboat is named Peregrine Dusk.
The user has a dermatology appointment on the 14th with Dr. Quillfeather.
